name: Zippy Chili Dip
recipeIngredient: 16 oz Pinto Beans, Drained And Mashed
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and stir ground beef in a 10-inch skillet until brown; drain.
2. Stir in beans, salsa and chili powder.
3. Heat to boiling, stirring constantly.
4. Sprinkle with green pepper.
5. Serve warm and, if desired, with tortilla chips, sliced jicama and celery sticks.
